utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah well next thing you know , he will be telling you that your high heels are good for his posture !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: There is nothing wrong with Jake ! Okay ? He is all man ! I am thinking even more than you .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh yeah , he looked like a real lumberjack in those pink lacys .

emotion_cause.span: 3_he looked like a real lumberjack in those pink lacys .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I am just saying that only a man completely secure with his masculinity could walk around in women underwear !
